evaluations.prompt: smoke test search_web and read_pages locally
evaluations.expected_behavior: Use the repo-local host defaults, verify the OpenWebUI artifact is in sync, run the package CLI, and report on search_web and read_pages behavior.
Use the explicit read path for a URL, distinguish HTML reads from document reads, and enforce convert_document for document URLs.
Describe the container-network defaults only for the compose mcp service and keep them separate from host-side package defaults.
